slides.headline: Empower your team with seamless backup certifying
slides.body: Ensure your institution is prepared with our cross-training solution.

slides.headline: Comprehensive training
slides.body: Learn essential certification procedures and policies.

slides.headline: Skill assessment
slides.body: Test your knowledge and get immediate feedback.

slides.headline: Role-playing sessions
slides.body: Practice with other certifying officials in real-time scenarios.

slides.headline: Confidence boost
slides.body: Gain the confidence to handle all certification tasks independently.

slides.headline: Certification readiness
slides.body: Your new backup is ready to step in and support your team.

outline.caption: Empower your VA School Certifying Officials with our cross-training solution. In three weeks, your team will achieve three milestones: comprehensive training, skill assessment, and role-playing sessions, all leading to a confident backup certifying official. Take the first step by linking in bio.

rubricBreakdown.critique: The weakest slide is Step 3, 'Role-playing sessions', as it could benefit from a more detailed description of what role-playing entails and how it contributes to the overall training program.
